autor: to depend on the presence of the crowd is weakness. The man who needs a mob to nerve him is much more alone than he imagines.
explicacao: Citação de to depend on the presence of the crowd is weakness. The man who needs a mob to nerve him is much more alone than he imagines. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Solitude is strength” articula reflexao, paul-brunton, solitude em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
